title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 03 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 03 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 03 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 03/03/2025
Today, iron ore futures continued last week's downward trend. The most-traded I2505 contract closed at 779.5 yuan/mt, down 2.81% for the day.Traders showed moderate willingness to sell, while steel mills purchased as needed, mainly adopting a high-frequency, low-volume procurement strategy. The mainstream transaction prices of PB fines in Shandong were 780-790 yuan/mt, down 10-15 yuan/mt from last Friday, while in Tangshan, the transaction prices were around 795-800 yun/mt, also down 10-15 yuan/mt from last Friday.
